pages.text: The moment a horse is fully tamed, it becomes $(thing)owned$() and starts working with Better Horses systems. No paperwork.

pages.title: Command Wheel
pages.text: Use $(item)Ctrl + Right Click$() on an owned horse to open the radial command wheel.$(br2)$(li)$(thing)Follow$(): the horse tails after you.$(li)$(thing)Stay$(): it waits right where you leave it.$(li)$(thing)Set Home$(): marks the current spot as home and switches the horse to Stay.$(li)$(thing)Return Home$(): sends the horse trotting back to that saved spot.

pages.title: Whistle and Bond
pages.text: Press $(item)P$() by default to whistle for your owned horse. Nearby mounts switch to $(thing)Follow$(), while distant ones get hauled closer to you.$(br2)Bond runs from $(item)0$() to $(item)100$(), and every 20 bond adds more speed and jump strength.$(br2)$(li)Stick close to your horse for slow, steady passive bond gain.$(li)Use a $(item)Name Tag$() for +10 bond.$(li)Feed a $(item)Golden Apple$() for +2 bond.
